title: Beauty products
text: I LOVE all Charlotte Tilbury products, I have used just about every brand of make up and beauty products, and I have to say Charlotte Tilbury is definitely high-end quality and at the top of my list for myself and for when I shop for gifts! The eyeshadow palettes are always beautiful colors and the pigment is excellent, it will last all day without reapplying! The lipsticks come in the most beautiful colors, and slide on so smoothly, making your lips feel hydrated all day long! You won’t ever regret a Charlotte Tilbury purchase, I never have! And anyone I have bought a gift for always loves any gift from Charlotte Tilbury! You just can’t go wrong with any choice of product!

title: By far the best brand I’ve ever used..
text: From the flawless finishes to the glow from within, Charlotte Tilbury REALLY is that girl. She’s proven time and time again that she’s here to stay, and the proof is in the pudding darling! You can try ANY of the products and see the truly unmatchable results. My personal favorite would have to be the Pinkgasm Sunset blush, followed by the OG Pinkgasm!! Love Charlotte and the team the most!! Forever greatful to them for making my base and eyes FLAWLESS.🤍🎀

title: Stop logging me out
text: Please fix the login issues. Every time I close the app, when I open it back up, I have to login again and again. Every other app on my phone keeps me logged in unless it’s an app that is a financial app. It’s really annoying to have to log in every time I want to use my account.

title: Absolutely AMAZING I HAVE NEVER WROTE A REVIEW BEFORE UNTIL THIS APP♥️
text: First off I just wanted to say that I’ve never written a review before until I opened this app. I’ve literally just downloaded it and wow. This app is so easily accessible and easy to navigate. All of the images and videos are so nice. The one thing that really surprised me was the learn section of this app. I thoroughly enjoyed this because it serves as a tool to see what products are best for doing certain looks and it’s quite fun to scroll around in. Don’t forget there are app exclusive items which is such a fun quirk. Thank you for making this wonderful and efficient app. Truly gorgeous ❤️❤️

title: My go-to beauty all!
text: Since downloading the CT app, it’s been a timesaver for ordering all my beauty essentials, not to mention the great tutorials and my loyalty rewards right at my fingertips. Love the free samples and customer service r chat option!

title: Love it!
text: This is an amazing app.  It does so much more than make shopping easy.  There are learning videos that I have picked up tips from, and a master class calendar so you can easily book a class.  I love the  skin analysis that allows you to track your progress as you use the products!  And it is so easy to navigate though, it is a dream.

title: LOVE the App!
text: As a huge fan of all Charlotte Tilbury makeup and skincare, the app has made it so much easier to get the right products for me. With the skin analysis, and shade finder, I can easily get the Right products for my skin type and skin tone. The “app first” product launches are great, making sure I get the new launches I want right away. One of the Best things is all the videos they have available that show all the products and the best way to use them. It’s like having Team Tilbury at your home getting you looking your Best Self.❤️

title: App

title: Awful!
text: After deleting products I recently had in my basket, I made an order for $60. I made sure the products were not in my basket anymore and that my total was definitely $60, but after paying and reviewing my order, it added back the items I had deleted and increased my total up to $150! I phoned them and they said they couldn’t modify/cancel my order even though I had just made it, they haven’t even packed my order yet and they can’t cancel it???
